testcase.name: test_create_perizia_strutturale_generates_6_items
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_perizia_sinistro.py:125: in test_create_perizia_strutturale_generates_6_items assert response.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 201, got 401: {"detail":"Sessione non valida"} E assert 401 == 201 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
